designSystem.style: Dark fantasy RPG aesthetic with vibrant purple and gold accents. Deep navy background with glowing card surfaces, gradient quest banners, and gamified UI elements. Rounded corners, emoji-rich iconography, and XP-driven progress indicators throughout.

screens: Map — Quest board with active quest banner, XP level progress bar, available quests list with difficulty/subject tags, and daily challenges tracker
Quest — Immersive storytelling screen with gradient scene header, NPC dialogue bubble, knowledge challenge question, interactive multiple-choice answers with correct/incorrect feedback and XP reward
Hero — Character profile with customizable avatar color aura, level and class display, four character stats with progress bars, and 2x3 achievement badge grid
League — Weekly leaderboard with 3-player podium visualization, full ranked scholar list with streaks, and open Study Party invitation with join CTA
Progress — Analytics dashboard with stats summary row, weekly XP bar chart, subject mastery progress bars, and earned/locked achievement badge gallery
